turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hello, is this [CONSUMER_NAME]?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Yeah. Who's calling?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hey [CONSUMER_NAME], this is [AGENT_NAME]. Can you confirm your date of birth for me real quick?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: It's [DATE_OF_BIRTH]. What do you want?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks. And your mailing address is still [STREET_ADDRESS], right?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Uh, yeah, that's right. What's this about?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I'm calling about your [CREDITOR_NAME] account. You have an outstanding balance of [DEBT_AMOUNT]. This account is ninety days past due and — um — we really need to get this resolved today. Can you pay the full balance?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Wait, wait. What company did you say?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: [AGENCY_NAME]. We handle the recovery for [CREDITOR_NAME].

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Are you like... a debt collector or something? Because my husband said I shouldn't talk to debt collectors without—

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: No, no, think of us more like a payment solutions partner. We're here to help you get this off your plate. Look, if you can pay today, I can get you a twenty percent discount. That's six hundred ninety dollars off. You'd only pay twenty-seven sixty. But I need a commitment right now.

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: I — I don't even know if this is my debt. I had a [CREDITOR_NAME] card years ago but I thought I paid it off.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: The system shows a balance of thirty-four fifty. Whether you thought you paid it or not, it's still showing as active. We can do the settlement for twenty-seven sixty if you pay by Friday. Otherwise, I — I mean, we'll need to discuss next steps. What's your decision?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: I need to think about it. And I need to see something in writing before I pay anything.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We already sent letters. Check your mail. Anyway, the offer expires Friday. Call me back at [PHONE_NUMBER], extension 442. My name's [AGENT_NAME].

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Okay... but wait. Don't you have to tell me something first? Like, aren't you supposed to say you're collecting a debt?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: We're a recovery solutions firm, [CONSUMER_NAME]. That's basically the same thing. The important part is that you pay by Friday. Do I have your word?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: No, you don't have my word. I don't even know who you are. This feels wrong.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Look, I'm trying to help you here. The full balance is thirty-four fifty. If you don't take the settlement, your credit is going to tank even worse. Can you at least do five hundred today?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: I can't do five hundred. I don't have that.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: What can you do?

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: I don't know. Maybe a hundred? But I want to see the paperwork first.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: A hundred doesn't move the needle. Listen, call me back by Friday. The number is [PHONE_NUMBER]. Extension four-four-two. Don't wait too long.

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: Fine. Bye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bye.

turns.speaker: consumer
turns.text: [background] Huh?
